LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOANNA BANKS' MOTION TO VACATE THE ORDER OF DISMISSAL AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 AND WILL BE HEARD ON SEPTEMBER 28, 2015, AT 9:30 A.M. THIS CASE IS A LANDLORD-TENANT MATTER PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.10A AND SUCH MATTERS ARE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501. IN FACT, PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO VACATE A DISMISSAL THAT JUDGE QUIDACHAY IN DEPARTMENT 501 ISSUED. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD, 4TH, 6TH, 8TH, AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD WITH MORE SPECIFICITY AS TO TOM'S RELATIONSHIP AND INVOLVEMENT WITH GREEN OASIS AS TO THE COMMERCIAL LEASE. IT APPEARS THAT TOM IS NOT A SIGNATORY PARTY TO THE UNDERLYING LEASE AT ISSUE. AS TO 5TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THOSE CLAIMS. JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY, CLERK K.LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D501

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney John Park Jennings for Defendant Green Oasis Limited partnership the moving party.
Attorney Andrew Dai for Plaintiff Joanna Banks dba HRD the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT RICHARD TOM DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer, including but not limited to (1) the contract; (2) reconcile inconsistent allegations in the second and third causes of action; (3) facts giving rise to UCL violation cause of action; (4) outrageous conduct; and (4) duty. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Defendant Richard Toms Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney John Park Jennings for Defendant Green Oasis Limited partnership the moving party.
Attorney Andrew Dai for Plaintiff Joanna Banks dba HRD the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICHARD TOM Notice Of Motion And Defendant Richard Toms Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint is moot. No order submitted. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Plaintiff Joanna Bank'S Motion To Vacate The Order Of Dismissal And For Leave To File An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Talent Lau, Esq. (415-398-8308) for Plaintiff/Moving party Joanna Banks.
John Park Jennings, Esq. (650-989-5400) for Defendant/opposing party Richard Tom.

The Court announces the tentative ruling rule. Both sides Argue. Defendant argues no compliance with 473. Plaintiff argues error on declaration. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Joanna Bank'S Motion To Vacate The Order Of Dismissal And For Leave To File An Amended Complaint is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed order. Plaintiff submits a proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Order Of Dismissal And For Leave To File An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOANNA BANKS' Motion To Vacate The Order Of Dismissal And For Leave To File An Amended Complaint is transferred to Department 501 and will be heard on September 28, 2015, at 9:30 a.m. This case is a landlord-tenant matter per San Francisco Local Rule 8.10A and such matters are heard in Department 501. In fact, Plaintiff seeks to vacate a dismissal that Judge Quidachay in Department 501 issued. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)

Defendant Richard Tom'S Motion To Strike Complaint On Court'S Own Motion
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Line 2
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
No appearance by the plaintiff / Opposing Party
Attorney Pamela Bumatay, Esq. of Clapp Moroney Law Group (650) 989-5400, counsel for defendant / Moving Party
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and with no appearance by the plaintiff adopts the tentative rulings as follows: Motion To Strike Complaint On Court's Own Motion DENIED as moot.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Line 2
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
No appearance by the plaintiff / Opposing Party
Attorney Pamela Bumatay, Esq. of Clapp Moroney Law Group (650) 989-5400, counsel for defendant / Moving Party
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and with no appearance by the plaintiff adopts the tentative rulings as follows: DEFENDANT RICHARD TOM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 6th, 8th, and 9th Causes of Action. Plaintiff to plead with more specificity as to Tom's relationship and involvement with Green Oasis as to the commercial lease. It appears that Tom is not a signatory party to the underlying lease at issue. As to 5th and 7th Causes of Action, Plaintiff will dismiss those claims. Order signed in open Court
